---
title: "Story of the Christians and the Moors in Spain, The."
---

## Story of the Christians and the Moors in Spain, The.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1878
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
